example: My name is Bond, Jamie Bond, and I am a mystery shopper.
zh: 神秘顧客，受雇暗中評估商店服務品質的人
ja: 覆面調査員、店舗のサービスを秘密裏に評価する人

example: I work for Nielsen and Nielsen's department store.
This flyer says you have bags for sale.
That bag has a 20% discount on it.
How much is this tote bag?
ja: トートバッグ、大きな手提げ袋

example: You get an extra discount if you sign up for a free membership here.
The membership will give you a coupon for an extra $10 discount.
It's not a bargain, but still pretty good.
ja: 掘り出し物、お買い得品

example: Don't forget to give me a receipt.
